apns_credential.description: APNs credential required for sending push notifications to Apple devices; must include valid certificate and key.
apns_credential.type: list(object({application_mode: string,bundle_id: string,key_id: string,team_id: string,token: string}))

gcm_credential.description: Google Cloud Messaging (GCM) credentials required for sending push notifications to Android devices via the notification hub.

name.description: The name of the Notification Hub, which must be unique within the Azure region and comply with Azure naming conventions.

namespace_name.description: Specifies the name of the namespace within which the notification hub resides; must be unique within the resource group.

tags.description: Key-value pairs for categorizing and organizing the notification hub. Constraints: keys must be unique and values must be non-empty.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeouts for create, read, update, and delete operations on the notification hub resource.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
